Notice Of Hearing Re Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Claim to Surplus Funds is GRANTED. Claimant to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Ccp 2924j(C)&(D)
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATIO's Petition To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Ccp 2924j(C)&(D)is GRANTED. $425,906.15 to be deposited forthwith. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j(C) & (D)
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Theron S. Covey III (619-501-3503) for Plaintiff/Moving party NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION via court call.
No other appearances.

The court announces the tentative ruling and inquires whether notice is proper. Plaintiff informs the court it is willing to re-notice the motion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION Hearing On Petition To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j(C) & (D) is off calendar. Plaintiff to notice the motion properly. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
